title: Axolotl+
description:
Adds Axolotl Variants in the game! also adds bucket variants for axolotl! 

to swap out axolotls keep switching them using a bucket

THIS PACK REQUIRED OPTIFINE

Also adds glass connected textures :D
body:
Axolotl+

Adds over 20 new axolotl textures to the game!

to get the rainbow axolotl you have to name a lucy axolotl to "Junky_" :D
Every major update to the pack will add a secret axolotl hidden in the GUI

 

Please do not claim this pack as your own

Your axolotl WILL change variants everytime you pick it up with a bucket,

Cycle variants with a bucket

(Silver and rainbow axolotl wont change variants)
You need optifine or EMF+ETF to use this pack.
